content.text: How can I retrieve an associated resource setting (`rst`) for this unit, starting with its local value and propagating up through its parent hierarchy?
What happens if the parent chain eventually reaches a root that does not implement `UnitBase` and has no further parents?
If the recursion hits an object that doesn't match the expected types, it will keep calling itself on its parent until it potentially fails or meets the assertion check failure.
This explains how resource association flows up the hierarchy.
